suggested_fixes: Optionally require inputs to be contiguous instead of copying if avoiding hidden allocation/copy overhead is important.
Optionally save and restore cuBLAS pointer mode if strict handle-state preservation is desired.
warnings: The function makes contiguous copies of non-contiguous inputs, which is safe but may add runtime overhead.
The cuBLAS handle pointer mode and stream are set on the current handle and not restored. This is typical for PyTorch CUDA extensions but can be considered shared-handle state mutation.
